name: Elon Musk
executiveSummary:
Elon Musk is a visionary entrepreneur, investor, and business magnate known for revolutionizing multiple industries, including aerospace, electric vehicles, and renewable energy. He is the CEO and Chief Engineer of SpaceX, CEO and Product Architect of Tesla, Inc., and the owner of X (formerly Twitter).

Musk's aggressive approach to innovation has made him one of the wealthiest people in the world, with a stated mission to reduce global warming through sustainable energy production and to make humanity multi-planetary.

basicDetails.currentRole: CEO of Tesla & SpaceX, Owner of X

biography:
Born in Pretoria, South Africa, Musk briefly attended the University of Pretoria before moving to Canada at age 17, acquiring citizenship through his Canadian-born mother. Two years later, he matriculated at Queen's University and transferred to the University of Pennsylvania, where he received bachelor's degrees in economics and physics. He moved to California in 1995 to attend Stanford University but dropped out after two days to pursue a business career.

Musk co-founded Zip2, a web software company, which was acquired by Compaq for $307 million in 1999. He then co-founded X.com, a direct bank. X.com merged with Confinity in 2000 to form PayPal, which eBay acquired for $1.5 billion in 2002. With $175.8 million, Musk founded SpaceX in 2002. In 2004, he was an early investor in electric vehicle manufacturer Tesla Motors, Inc. (now Tesla, Inc.). He became its chairman and product architect, assuming the position of CEO in 2008.

In recent years, Musk has founded The Boring Company, co-founded Neuralink and OpenAI, and acquired Twitter for $44 billion. His leadership style is often described as intense and demanding, pushing boundaries in engineering and physics.

recentNews.title: SpaceX Starship Launch
recentNews.description: Successfully executed multiple test flights of the Starship megarocket, aiming for Mars colonization.

recentNews.title: Tesla Robotaxi Announcement
recentNews.description: Announced aggressive timelines for Tesla's autonomous Robotaxi network.

recentNews.title: xAI Development
recentNews.description: Raised billions for his artificial intelligence startup, xAI, to compete with OpenAI and develop Grok.
